description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these ankle socks from playboy. Made of a blended fabric, these blue, black and lavender striped socks can be worn both for sporting events and casual days. Made of blended fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Padded foot-bed for cushioned comfort Seamless stitch for abrasion-free wear Rib knit cuff with brand logo and roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability Procured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) &ndash the India licensee for Playboy Men&rsquo s Underwear Sock care Machine wash cold with like colours using mild detergent Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
